subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Hearken unto the Call of thy Lord from this far-distant Shore. Verily, there is no God but Him, the Mighty One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی ان استمع ندآء مولاک من هذا الشطر البعید انه لا اله الا هو العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
